Room.title: Room
Room.description: An IPL Auction lobby and active session state with synchronized bidding.

hostId.description: User ID of the room creator

currentBidderId.description: UID of the current highest bidder

currentBidderName.description: Franchise name of the current highest bidder

currentPlayerId.description: ID of the player currently up for auction

timerExpiresAt.description: Unix Epoch timestamp in milliseconds for bid timer expiry

budgetLimit.description: Initial team purse in Lakhs (e.g. 10000 for 100 Cr)

slotsConfig.description: Required slot count for BAT, BOWL, AR, and WK

members.description: Structured map of members by UID with budget and compiled squad

currentPlayerIndex.description: Index of current player in the room's draft pool

playerPoolIds.description: Ordered array of player IDs in draft cycle

Signal.title: Signal
Signal.description: WebRTC P2P signaling candidate or session description for real-time voice chat.

targetId.description: UID of the target receiving peer

payload.description: JSON stringified WebRTC description or ICE candidate

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: Lobby or live auction chat messages.

senderName.description: Display name of franchise or user

Log.title: Log
Log.description: Chronological audit logs of drafts, biddings, sales, and system resets.

amount.description: Optional auction bid amount in Lakhs

buyerName.description: Franchise name of buyer if sold

/rooms/{roomId}/signals/{signalId}.description: High-speed WebRTC P2P multi-user audio signaling network.

/rooms/{roomId}/logs/{logId}.description: Auditable transaction logs of players sold, unsold, and bid events.
